title: potentilla × diversifolia
intro: Potentilla × diversifolia, also known as Silver Buffaloberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of salicylic acid and other phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla × diversifolia include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and exhibit antioxidant properties. Potentilla × diversifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
